data.title: Quadient Collaborates with Lush Cosmetics to Transform Accounts Payable Operations with its AP Automation Software
data.description: A popular UK-based retailer, Lush, has chosen Quadient's Accounts Payable (AP) automation software to enhance and simplify its financial processes. This decision marks a strategic move towards modernizing and optimizing the company's finance operations.
Nordic property fund, eQ Community Properties, gets Baa3 rating from Moody's with stable outlook - a first in the region.

data.title: BNB price aims for $650-700 by April with indicators signaling mixed trends. Short-term target $635-650, medium-term $650-700. Bullish breakout level $627.49, critical support $599.23.
data.description: A price forecast for BNB suggests a short-term target of $635-650 within a week and a medium-term range of $650-700 over one month. The bullish breakout level is at $627.49, while critical support is noted at $599.23.

data.title: Uxin Announces Official Opening of Its Tianjin Used Car Superstore
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Uxin Limited, a prominent used car retailer in China traded on Nasdaq under the symbol UXIN, revealed the launch of its sixth used car superstore in Tianjin. This establishment marks another milestone in Uxin's expansion strategy as it further solidifies its presence in the market. The new superstore in Tianjin showcases Uxin's reconditioning services, emphasizing the company's commitment to providing high-quality used vehicles to its customers.

data.title: Avacta announces first patient treated in Phase 1 FOCUS-01 trial of FAP-Exd (AVA6103) - a sustained-release pre|CISION® exatecan peptide drug conjugate
data.description: Enrollment has commenced in the second Avacta clinical trial at three premier oncology centers in the United States. This marks a significant milestone for Avacta as they continue to expand their clinical programs. The trial aims to enroll a total of X patients across the three centers to evaluate the effectiveness of Avacta's innovative therapy in treating oncology patients. This development underscores the company's commitment to advancing medical research and improving patient outcomes in the field of oncology.

data.title: 'Tiger King' Fame Joe Exotic's Appeal Turned Down By Supreme Court — Here's What Happened To His Namesake TKING Crypto
data.description: A cryptocurrency associated with the "Tiger King" documentary experienced a decline following the Supreme Court's decision not to review the appeal case of Joseph Maldonado-Passage. Tiger King Coin (TKING), which is tradable on Ethereum and BNB Chain, dropped 0.6% in the past day to $0.0000001937, as per CoinGecko data. The coin had a fully diluted value of $180,653, with only $1,140 worth of TKING traded recently.

data.title: Bitcoin aims for $72,000 in April 2026 with a short-term target at $72,000 and a medium-term forecast between $65,000-$74,000. Bulls eye $69,537. Support at $65.
data.description: Summary: Bitcoin price predictions indicate a short-term target of $72,000 within a week. For the medium-term, forecasts suggest a range between $65,000 and $74,000 over a month. The bullish breakout level is set at $69,537, while critical support stands at $65.

data.title: onsemi Powers Sineng Electric’s Advanced  Solar and Energy Storage Solutions
data.description: onsemi recently secured a significant design win with Sineng Electric for the inclusion of onsemi’s cutting-edge hybrid Power Integrated Module (PIM) in two renewable energy platforms. This partnership marks a crucial milestone for onsemi, showcasing their advanced technology adoption in the sustainable energy sector. This collaboration underscores onsemi's commitment to innovation and environmentally-friendly solutions, opening doors for new opportunities in the industry. The implementation of onsemi’s latest-generation hybrid PIM in these platforms highlights the company's dedication to providing efficient and reliable solutions in the renewable energy market.

data.title: Ethereum set to break $2,300 with current price at $2,058. Analysts eye $2,301 by month-end as indicators signal neutrality. Key resistance at $2,133 presents breakout opportunity.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum is $2,058, with analysts aiming for a target of $2,301 by the end of the month. Technical indicators suggest a neutral momentum as Ethereum nears a crucial resistance level at $2,133, indicating a possible breakout in the near future.

data.title: STARTRADER Launches Web STAR Copy to Expand Social Trading Capabilities
data.description: A website has launched a new feature called Web STAR Copy in Dubai, UAE on March 30, 2026, aiming to provide traders with enhanced control, flexibility, and confidence. This feature enables users to share strategies and automatically replicate trades. STARTRADER's innovation aims to streamline the process of copying trades, granting traders the opportunity to benefit from others' expertise. Users can now easily access and replicate trades, boosting their trading experience. This advancement in online trading fosters an environment of collaboration and efficiency, catering to the needs of traders seeking to optimize their trading strategies.

data.title: Abbisko Therapeutics' FGFR2/3 Inhibitor ABSK061 Receives FDA IND Clearance for Achondroplasia in Children
data.description: Abbisko Therapeutics Co., Ltd. made an announcement on March 30, 2026, revealing that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved the Investigational New Drug (IND) application for ABSK061. Abbisko Therapeutics, identified by the HKEX code: 02256.HK, shared this news in Shanghai.
